articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Price Surges Over 8% as Chang Hard Fork Nears
articles.description: Popular smart contract network Cardano (ADA) has launched node 10.1 in a critical release ahead of the upcoming Chang 2 hard fork, which will bring significant upgrades to the network’s governance system, including completing the transition to on-chain governance. The price of Cardano has notably surged by more than 8% over the last 24-hour period […]

articles.title: Massive ETH Whale Makes Shocking U-Turn, Dumps 14,240 ETH as BTC Skyrockets
articles.description: Ethereum price yet to mirror upward trend to same extent

articles.title: Ethereum Whale Sells 15,000 ETH Worth $39.38M on Kraken
articles.description: An ancient Ethereum whale sold 15,000 ETH on Kraken for $39.38M, marking a continued trend of large sales since September 2024 as Ethereum Whale Sells affect the market.

articles.title: Crypto community celebrates Trump’s election victory
articles.description: Donald Trump was not always a cryptocurrency fan, but the community has rallied around him as a pro-crypto candidate in the 2024 US presidential election.

articles.title: Solana Pay Now Supports Bitcoin, Ethereum, and More
articles.description: The popular crypto payment system, which was first built on the Solana blockchain, has just expanded to support Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Layer 2 (L2) solutions. This is a big deal for both merchants and customers. Now, anyone shopping at stores using Solana Pay can choose from a wider variety of payment options. What Does This […] The post Solana Pay Now Supports Bitcoin, Ethereum, and More...

articles.title: OpenSea 2.0: NFT Giant’s Big December Revamp
articles.description: OpenSea is set to relaunch in December with "OpenSea 2.0," adding new features like Bitcoin Ordinals support and rewards to reignite the NFT market.

articles.title: Ether traders eye more downside amid ETH/BTC tapping 'new multi-year lows'
articles.description: One market analyst said there's “no reversal in sight” for Ethereum’s value against Bitcoin.
